description: Phase 82: Deepen @quant/federation package with ActivityPub adapter (publish/follow/boost), AT Protocol adapter (posts/follows/feeds), CalDAV/CardDAV sync service, IMAP/SMTP bridge interface, and public API/self-host configuration.
steps: Create src/at-protocol/at-adapter.ts with ATProtocolAdapter class: createPost(did, content), deletePost(did, uri), follow(did, targetDid), unfollow(did, targetDid), getTimeline(did, limit), getFeed(feedUri, cursor), resolveHandle(handle). AT Protocol (Bluesky) integration.
Create src/at-protocol/at-identity.ts with ATIdentityService class: createDID(handle), resolveDID(did), rotateKeys(did), getProfile(did), updateProfile(did, profile). DID:PLC identity management.

Create src/at-protocol/at-feed-generator.ts with ATFeedGenerator class: registerFeed(feedId, algorithm), generateFeed(feedId, cursor, limit), getSubscriptions(did), subscribe(did, feedId), unsubscribe(did, feedId). Custom feed generators for AT Protocol.

Create src/activitypub/follow-manager.ts with FollowManager class: sendFollow(actorId, targetActorUrl), acceptFollow(followId), rejectFollow(followId), unfollow(actorId, targetActorUrl), getFollowers(actorId), getFollowing(actorId), isFollowing(actorId, targetId). ActivityPub follow/unfollow management.
Create src/activitypub/boost-service.ts with BoostService class: boost(actorId, objectUrl), unboost(actorId, objectUrl), getBoostedBy(objectUrl), getBoosts(actorId). Announce activity (boost/reblog).

Create src/sync/caldav-sync.ts with CalDAVSyncService class: sync(userId, serverUrl, credentials), push(userId, events[]), pull(userId, since), resolveConflicts(local, remote), getLastSync(userId). Two-way CalDAV synchronization.

Create src/sync/carddav-sync.ts with CardDAVSyncService class: sync(userId, serverUrl, credentials), push(userId, contacts[]), pull(userId, since), merge(local, remote), getLastSync(userId). Two-way CardDAV synchronization.

Create src/mail-protocols/imap-bridge.ts with IMAPBridge class: connect(config), listMailboxes(), fetchMessages(mailbox, range), search(criteria), moveMessage(uid, destination), setFlags(uid, flags[]), idle(mailbox, callback). Full IMAP bridge interface.
Create src/mail-protocols/smtp-bridge.ts with SMTPBridge class: connect(config), send(message), verify(address), getRelayStatus(), queueMessage(message), processQueue(). SMTP sending bridge.

Create src/public-api/api-config.ts with PublicAPIConfig class: getEndpoints(), registerEndpoint(path, method, handler, auth), generateOpenAPISpec(), setRateLimit(endpoint, limits), getAPIStatus(). Public API configuration for self-host.

Create src/public-api/self-host-config.ts with SelfHostConfig class: initialize(config), validateConfig(config), getRequiredServices(), getDatabaseConfig(), getFederationConfig(), getStorageConfig(), exportConfig(), importConfig(data). Self-host edition configuration.

Update src/index.ts to add new exports for ATProtocolAdapter, ATIdentityService, ATFeedGenerator, FollowManager, BoostService, CalDAVSyncService, CardDAVSyncService, IMAPBridge, SMTPBridge, PublicAPIConfig, SelfHostConfig
Create src/__tests__/at-adapter.test.ts testing createPost, follow, getTimeline, resolveHandle
Create src/__tests__/follow-manager.test.ts testing sendFollow, acceptFollow, getFollowers/getFollowing
Create src/__tests__/caldav-sync.test.ts testing sync, push, pull, resolveConflicts
Create src/__tests__/imap-bridge.test.ts testing connect, listMailboxes, fetchMessages, search
Create src/__tests__/self-host-config.test.ts testing initialize, validateConfig, exportConfig/importConfig
acceptance_criteria: pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/federation passes with no errors
pnpm test --filter=@quant/federation passes all tests including new test files (minimum 20 new test cases)
Package exports ATProtocolAdapter, ATIdentityService, ATFeedGenerator, FollowManager, BoostService, CalDAVSyncService, CardDAVSyncService, IMAPBridge, SMTPBridge, PublicAPIConfig, SelfHostConfig
Existing federation tests continue to pass alongside new tests
verification: source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/federation
source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm test --filter=@quant/federation
findings: All 160 tests pass (60 new + 100 existing). Typecheck clean. Fixed TS6133 unused-variable errors by removing unused private config fields in bridge classes and prefixing unused params with underscore. Prettier reformatted staged files via lint-staged hook.
